title: Attachments in integration with Jira

posts.author: Correspondent (Oren Navon)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m implementing integration between monday and Jira using the Jira app (installed via the monday marketplace)

there are 2 fields that the sync doesn’t work: the attached file and the comments.

when I’m adding a comment in the Jira issue, I can’t see it in the monday item and vice versa

This also occurs when I want to attach a file

How can I fix it?

Thanks
